title: Rodney Malcolm
compiled_truth: Rodney Malcolm is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-14 to 2002-05-06), Rodney Malcolm sent 9 and received 270 emails, totalling 279 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (8), [Finley Biggerstaff](people/finley-biggerstaff) (7), [Tanya Rohauer](people/tanya-rohauer) (2), [Jim Fallon](people/jim-fallon) (1), [Raymond Bowen](people/raymond-bowen) (1).
